channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: What it will take for Big Tech to wow investors this earnings season
item.description: US stock futures (ES=F, NQ=F, YM=F) got a lift in Monday's pre-market trading, coming off of last week's chip sell-off as investors await to hear earnings results from Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL), Tesla (TSLA), Intel (INTC), and IBM (IBM) this week. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman is joined by Yahoo Fi...

item.title: Tesla Q2 Earnings Preview: What To Expect From Upcoming Report
item.description: Tesla Earnings Are Coming. Wall Street Wants More Than a Delivery Beat

item.title: Tesla remote operator crashed a ‘Robotaxi’ in Houston, NHTSA data shows
item.description: Tesla has filed four new “Robotaxi” crash reports with NHTSA, and the most revealing one involves a Tesla remote operator driving the vehicle into a tree stump in Houston. It’s the third crash Tesla has now reported involving a human operating the car remotely caused the collision — and the first...

item.title: Tesla Stock And The Price Of Its Ambition
item.description: The company is making a colossal bet on its future, and one number reveals the immediate cost to investors.

item.title: Musk Says Tesla’s Will Remember How You Drive. Why That Matters for the Stock.
item.description: Tesla reports second quarter earnings on Wednesday and Elon Musk is teasing more technology improvements.

item.title: Stocks Need Some Tech Magic to Kickstart Market Rally
item.description: Gas prices top $4 a gallon again, Nike loses the World Cup, SpaceX eyes data center deal, and more news to start your day.

item.title: America’s Debt Just Shattered a WWII Record. Elon Musk Says Only One Thing Can Save Us.
item.description: Federal debt just crossed a threshold not seen since soldiers were coming home from World War II, and the math shows spending cuts cannot close the gap. Elon Musk says only one force in the world is large enough to prevent national bankruptcy.

item.title: Tesla increases profit in Germany despite lower production
item.description: Tesla concluded the 2025 fiscal year at its Grünheide plant in Germany with higher profits despite declining production and revenue. At the same time, the US electric car manufacturer is preparing a significant production ramp-up at the plant and continues to expand the site with its own battery ...

item.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Releases Wall Street Estimates Ahead of Q2 Earnings: Here's What Analysts Expect
item.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) released its company-compiled data of sell-side analysts’ forecasts for the automaker’s second-quarter 2026 earnings estimates ahead of this week’s earnings call. Analysts Predict $27 Billion in Revenue On Saturday, the Elon Musk-led automaker announced earnings forecasts...

item.title: Tesla Diner is throwing a birthday party with a Franz-signed special treat
item.description: Tesla is throwing its Hollywood Diner a first birthday party on July 21 and the celebration comes with a guest list of unique items, including a limited run of Tesla Diner birthday hats personally signed by Tesla Chief Designer Franz von Holzhausen for the first 50 customers who place an in-car o...

item.title: Tesla Updates FSD V14 Lite (Update 2026.20.6.10) Release Notes
item.description: Tesla Updates FSD V14 Lite (Update 2026.20.6.10) Release Notes

item.title: TSLA Stock Rises Overnight On Germany Ramp Ahead Of Q2: Analyst Sees 10% Delivery Jump This Year, Improving Margins
item.description: Investors will watch Tesla's updates on margins, cash flow, Cybertruck, FSD 15, and Optimus.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Oil Prices Rise Amid Iran News; Google, Tesla Ahead
item.description: Dow Jones futures: Iran attacks killed three U.S. servicemembers. Google earnings and capex guidance will be key this week.

item.title: Tesla, Alphabet, Intel, GM: Earnings to watch this week
item.description: Asking for a Trend Host Josh Lipton previews several of the biggest stories to come throughout next week, including earnings results out from Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL), Tesla (TSLA), General Motors (GM), and Intel (INTC).

item.title: Mercedes Benz (XTRA:MBG) Unveils CLA 250 Plus To Take On Tesla Model 3
item.description: Mercedes-Benz Group (XTRA:MBG) has unveiled the revamped CLA 250+, a new luxury electric vehicle. The CLA 250+ is positioned as a direct competitor to Tesla's Model 3 in the premium EV segment. The model features an updated design, extended driving range, and a suite of advanced technologies.

item.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Remains One of the Last Great Founder-Led Tech Giants. Is the Stock a Buy Before July 22?
item.description: Will Musk's "dogged determination" help Tesla beat expectations?

item.title: Wall Street Brunch: Tesla Reports With Earnings In Full Swing
Jobs, GM, Tesla, Alphabet, Intel, Verizon, and More to Watch This Week
item.description: It’s a heavy earnings week, with results also coming in from Halliburton, 3M, AT&T, Blackstone, and more. On the economic front, we’ll see data on jobs, new-home sales, and industry purchasing activity.

item.title: Tesla Heads Into Its July 22 Earnings Down 22%, and One Firm Sees a 67% Plunge From Here. Who's Right?
item.description: Twenty-five percent delivery growth on one side. A 67% downside call on the other. Wednesday's report starts to settle it.

item.title: The Mercedes CLA 250+ is a more luxurious Model 3 — at a surprisingly good price: Review
item.description: Mercedes may have a winner on its hands — one that has the Tesla Model 3 in its sights.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures Loom As U.S.-Iran Attacks Escalate; Google, Tesla, AMD Ahead
item.description: Dow Jones futures: An Iran attack killed two U.S. servicemembers. Google earnings and capex guidance will be key this week.

item.title: Big Tech earnings test tech's big rotation: What to watch this week
item.description: Earnings results from Alphabet and Tesla headline a busy week, amid a chip sell-off and a conflict in Iran that keeps geopolitics simmering and oil prices rising.

item.title: What to Expect in Markets This Week: Alphabet, Tesla and Intel Headline Big Tech Earnings Reports
item.description: Earnings reporting season will kick into high gear this week with several major technology companies releasing results,

item.title: Even With Tesla Under $400, I'd Still Rather Buy This Unstoppable Growth Stock in July
item.description: Tesla shares are trading for less than $400, but one fast-growing restaurant chain looks like the better stock to buy.

item.title: TSLY Investors Are Missing Tesla’s Rally: How Option Income Strategy Costs You 30% in Upside
item.description: TSLY deposited distributions while Tesla climbed, so why does the account balance tell a completely different story? The answer lives inside a structure most investors never bother to open.

item.title: Tesla stock: How much does an improved auto business matter?
item.description: Investing.com -- Tesla’s stronger automotive performance should improve near-term earnings and help finance its artificial intelligence investments, but Morgan Stanley and Barclays said Robotaxi, Full Self-Driving and Optimus remain the main drivers of the stock’s valuation.

item.title: Bank of America revamps Tesla forecast before earnings
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) CEO Elon Musk, whom JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon once called “our Einstein", has had plenty on his plate lately. SpaceX’s (SPCX) latest Starship launch was aborted, sending the stock tumbling below its IPO price to $123.99 on Friday, 45% below its post-listing peak, according to ...

item.title: Honda goes all-in on EVs in a multibillion dollar market: commercial lawnmowers
item.description: Honda Automobile dealers will have to wait a little longer for a self-driving EV that seriously worry Tesla or GM – but Honda Power Equipment dealers are playing in a multibillion market, too, and they have an advanced, autonomous, and all-electric vehicle arriving right now.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Iran Attack Kills Two U.S. Troops; Google, Tesla, AMD Ahead
item.description: Dow Jones futures: An Iran attack killed two U.S. service members. Google earnings and capex guidance will be key this week.

item.title: Tesla FSD Will Be Able to Remember Interventions and Driver Habits: Musk
item.description: Tesla FSD Will Be Able to Remember Interventions and Driver Habits: Musk

item.title: Elon Musk says your Tesla will start to learn your individual preferences
item.description: Elon Musk said today on X that Teslas will start to learn your individual preferences. This is something that he seemed to hint toward earlier this month when he said parking was by far the biggest reason drivers intervene with Full Self-Driving. Musk made the comment in response to notable Tesla...

item.title: Tesla Must Recall 20,000 Vehicles Over Bright Headlights
item.description: Tesla Must Recall 20,000 Vehicles Over Bright Headlights

item.title: Ron DeSantis calls out media bias in Tesla crash coverage
item.description: Florida Governor Ron DeSantis has sharply criticized legacy media outlets for what he describes as selective and biased reporting on vehicle accidents involving Tesla. In a recent X post, DeSantis questioned why headlines routinely spotlight the Tesla brand in crash stories, even when human error...

item.title: Tesla Diner Celebrates Turning One With Signed Franz Merch
item.description: Tesla Diner Celebrates Turning One With Signed Franz Merch

item.title: Tesla Semi spotted in illinois
item.description: submitted by /u/Top-Enthusiasm3192 [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla face 3 major headwinds heading into earnings report
item.description: Earlier this month, Tesla investors got some much-needed good news when the electric vehicle maker reported that it delivered more than 480,000 vehicles in the second quarter. The 25% year-over-year increase marked Tesla's best second-quarter performance, topping the 466,140 deliveries it reporte...

item.title: Price Prediction: Tesla Poised for 12% Rally as Profit Margins Improve
item.description: Tesla has pulled back sharply from its December highs, leaving investors to weigh a stock priced for perfection against a wave of catalysts that could rewrite the bull case entirely.

item.title: Tesla's LFP Batteries Hold Up Best Over Time in New Study
item.description: Tesla's LFP Batteries Hold Up Best Over Time in New Study

item.title: Tesla Q2 Earnings Preview: The Numbers Will Beat, The Narrative May Not
With SpaceX Falling Below Its IPO Opening Price, Is Tesla a Better Buy for the Second Half of 2026?
item.description: Elon Musk's companies have significant upside potential but also face substantial risks.

item.title: Tesla Just Posted Its Best Second Quarter Deliveries Ever. Here's the 1 Number That Will Actually Move the Stock on July 22.
item.description: Record deliveries are already public. What they did to profitability arrives with next week's report.

item.title: Elon Musk Reacts to Jamie Dimon's ‘Einstein’ Praise With Two-Word Reply as Viral Post Hails His SpaceX and Tesla Legacy
item.description: Elon Musk thanked JPMorgan Chase & Co. CEO Jamie Dimon on Wednesday after an X post revived the banker’s comparison of the Tesla Inc. chief to legendary physicist and inventor Albert Einstein.

item.title: Tesla and Alphabet Earnings: The Metrics That Matter Most
item.description: A duo of Magnificent 7 members, namely Tesla (TSLA) and Alphabet (GOOGL), will help headline the reporting docket this week, who both head into their reports with favorable revisions for both earnings and sales.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Google, Tesla, AMD Loom After AI Stock Sell-Off
item.description: Google earnings and capex guidance will be key for battered AI stocks. Tesla, Intel, GE Vernova also will report.

item.title: Tesla Releases Q2 2026 Earnings Estimates from Analysts
item.description: Tesla Releases Q2 2026 Earnings Estimates from Analysts

item.title: Yahoo Finance test drives Mercedes-Benz's new luxury EV, the CLA 250+
item.description: Mercedes-Benz (MBG.DE, MBGAF) is shifting into high gear with a new luxury EV designed to better compete with Tesla's (TSLA) Model 3. Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian comes on Market Domination Overtime to discuss his test driving of the new CLA 250+ electric sedan.

item.title: Agility Robotics plants its flag in Tesla’s backyard
item.description: Agility is opening a new training center for its Digit robots in Fremont, California.

item.title: SpaceX Investors Face Harsh Reality Check
item.description: Post-IPO selloff deepens after another Starship setback

item.title: Podcast: TSLA shareholders wake up, Xpeng targets EU, VW goes cheaper, and more
item.description: In the Electrek Podcast , we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy. In this week’s episode, we discuss Tesla shareholders potentially starting to wake up, Xpeng targeting the European market, VW going cheaper with its EVs, and more.

item.title: TSLA Stock Slips — Investors Await Tesla’s Q2 Earnings And Semi Progress
item.description: Tesla said in a post on X on Friday that it has opened a new public Megacharger station in Bloomington, California, marking what the company’s team described as “the beginning of the Megacharger network.”
